scripts.dev:electron: tsup src/main/index.ts src/preload/index.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --watch --external electron
scripts.dev:app: wait-on tcp:5173 file:dist-electron/main/index.js file:dist-electron/preload/index.js && cross-env EVERNEAR_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist-electron/main/index.js
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.build:electron: tsup src/main/index.ts src/preload/index.ts --format cjs --out-dir dist-electron --external electron
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build
